overall.description: A cinematic walk along a wooden dock in Saint Denis from Red Dead Redemption 2, featuring period NPCs, a watchtower with a warning bell, moored sailing ships, and a red paddlewheel steamboat under an overcast sky. The camera moves smoothly past various characters in 1890s attire before transitioning to a covered walkway overlooking the harbor.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wooden dock dominated by a tall watchtower with a warning bell. A large steamship with red and white funnels is moored to the left. The camera walks forward past scattered NPCs sitting on benches, approaching the tower structure under an overcast sky.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up as the camera leaves the watchtower area, revealing the Saint Denis building on the right with its painted signage. Groups of NPCs in 1890s attire stand and sit along the dock, while sailing ships become visible in the distant harbor. The atmosphere is that of a busy port city.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along the open dock with panoramic views of the harbor, where numerous tall-masted sailing ships are moored. NPCs sit on benches facing the water, while others stand looking out at the vessels. The distant tree-lined shore is visible across the calm water.

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a covered section of the dock with a wooden roof overhead and white railings along the edge. A large red paddlewheel steamboat is moored prominently on the left, while a green bridge structure is visible in the distant background. The walkway continues forward with sparse pedestrian traffic.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a bustling wooden dock that transitions from the shadow of a watchtower to an expansive view of a busy port city. It begins by moving past a large steamship with red and white funnels, gliding toward a tall watchtower and its warning bell under an overcast sky. As the camera passes the tower and the NPCs resting on nearby benches, the environment opens up to reveal the Saint Denis building and its painted signage on the right. The scene then expands further, shifting from the immediate dock structures to a wider vista where groups of people in 1890s attire populate the waterfront and sailing ships emerge in the distant harbor.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a harbor dock that transitions from an open panoramic vista to a sheltered walkway. It begins by gliding past NPCs resting on benches and gazing out at a wide expanse of calm water where numerous tall-masted sailing ships are moored against a distant, tree-lined shore. As the camera advances, the open sky is replaced by the wooden roof and white railings of a covered section of the dock. The scene then shifts focus to a large red paddlewheel steamboat moored prominently on the left, with a green bridge structure appearing in the far distance. The movement finally carries the viewer further along the sheltered path through sparse pedestrian traffic.
